_comment: GPU/VRAM management settings. Tuned for RTX 4050 (6GB VRAM). The pipeline writes vram peaks to gpu_logs/vram_usage.jsonl per university; revisit these values if peaks routinely exceed 5500 MB.
cpu_fallback_quality_warning: XLM-RoBERTa-Large on CPU is 3-5x slower per university; use only if all GPU recovery steps exhausted.
